artPrompt: A weathered timber tithe barn crammed floor to rafters with sacks and stockpiled provisions stands open at the edge of the revival town, cold gold candlelight spilling from its doorway into a smoky blood-dark dusk. The looming clock tower rises beyond, ash drifting across an empty yard. Wide, hushed film-still landscape with deep apocalyptic backdrop and no central figure, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Tithe Barn of the Faithful
text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W} or {B}.
{3}, {T}, Remove two doom counters from the Doomsday Clock: You gain 5 life. The barn is full; the reckoning is, for now, postponed.
flavorText: Stocked for the end of days. The faithful overestimated how many beans the end of days would require.
